## Type of change

- [ ] New feature / API

## Checklist

- [ ] I follow **[`CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)** in this PR.
- [ ] I ran **`ctest`** (or equivalent) with **`QB_BUILD_TESTS=ON`** — all tests pass.
- [ ] If I changed behaviour, I added or updated **tests** in `tests/`.
- [ ] If **`QB_BUILD_BENCHMARKS=ON`** applies to my change, **benchmarks** still build.
- [ ] I updated **[`CHANGELOG.md`](CHANGELOG.md)** under **`[Unreleased]`** when the change is user-visible.
- [ ] I updated **[`README.md`](README.md)** if the public API or examples changed.
